---
title: "Tribute to Griffin Park"
author: "Robert W. Walker"
date: "2019-10-23"
categories: [Essex, category2]
image: "preview.png"
description: "A tribute to Griffin Park.  I had the opportunity to pub crawl all four pubs before kickoff.  Brentford's last season there."
---

## Ode to Griffin Park

Griffin Park's famous four corners make it the only football ground in England with four pubs on the four corners surrounding the ground.

Here's a link to the [curated twitter thread](https://threadreaderapp.com/thread/1162664441009360896.html).

[In the Beginning](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162664441009360896?s=20)

![Starting](img/Begins.jpg)

[The Griffin](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162676443215740929?s=20)

![The Griffin](https://rww.science/img/Griffin.jpg)

[To the Brook](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162678765476044801?s=20)

![A Walk](img/ToBrook.jpg)

[The Brook](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162679399390621696?s=20)

![Up New](img/Brook.jpg)

[Sussex Best at the Brook](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162680067169951747?s=20)

![Sussex Best](img/SussexB.jpg)

[The Garden](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162681505480695808?s=20)

![Up New](img/Garden.jpg)

[Up New Road](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162683814361141248?s=20)

![Up New](img/UpNew.jpg)

[The New Road Gate at Griffin Park](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162684379447136260?s=20)

![Gate](img/Gate.jpg)

[The New Inn](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162685016800972800?s=20)

![New Inn](img/NewInn.jpg)

[Doom Bar](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162686430642167809?s=20)

![DoomBar](img/DoomBar.jpg)

[Rules on the Main -- Ealing -- Road](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162686975578648576?s=20)

![Rules](img/Rules.jpg)

[The Arsenal Game](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162688019717066754?s=20)

![Gunners](img/Gunners.jpg)

[The Princess Royal](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162693750411485189?s=20)

![Princess Royal](img/PrincessRoyal.jpg)

[London Pride](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162694942323552256?s=20)

![Enter Here](img/LastFullers.jpg)

[Auba](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162708902246572032?s=20)

[To my seat](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162725768352477185?s=20)

![Enter Here](img/Entrance.jpg)

[Great Seat -- Pitch Side](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162726291054964736?s=20)

![Pitch Side](img/PitchSide.jpg)

[Eaves Really isn't Good](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162734071249870848?s=20)

![Eaves](img/Eaves.jpg)

[Tied at Half](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162738549092999168?s=20)

![HalfTime Tie](img/Tied.jpg)

[Final: 1-1](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162769046338789376?s=20)

![End of Game](img/Final.jpg)

[Queueing for the Tubes](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1162769309736869890?s=20)

![Human Mass](img/Street.jpg)

[My Signed Momento](https://twitter.com/PieRatio/status/1163589076785618945?s=20)

![Ticket](img/Proof.jpg)


## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
